title: W2 index.json (asset slot manifest)
description: The asset slot manifest written by the W2 Scaffold node (<project>/index.json). The engine-agnostic single source of truth for asset keys + dimensions, derived from gdd.assetList[] UNION gdd.entities[].assetSlot. W3 reads it to know what to generate and writes back `path`+`status`; W4 and the Preloader read it for the canonical key<->dims map so nobody re-scans public/. Distinct from any per-atlas Phaser JSON-Hash frame file. Authored by packages/skills/scaffold/SKILL.md.

archetype.description: Copied from gdd.meta.archetype. Lets W3 apply archetype-conditioned generation rules (side-view vs top-down vs front-bust).

assetsDir.description: Project-relative dir where assets live and slot `path`s resolve, served as-is by Vite. Default 'public/assets'.

slots.description: One row per asset slot. Derived from gdd.assetList[] (one slot each) UNION any gdd.entities[].assetSlot not already covered. Empty array is valid (no art needed yet). Each slot key becomes a Phaser texture key.

slot.description: Slot key = the Phaser texture key. From gdd.assetList[].slot or gdd.entities[].assetSlot (e.g. 'player','coin','tile_ground','bg_level'). snake_case, unique.

type.description: Asset kind. Carried from gdd.assetList[].type; entity-derived slots with no assetList row default to 'sprite'. Drives W3 generation + the Preloader load call (load.image/load.spritesheet/load.atlas/load.audio).

path.description: assetsDir-relative file path the loader uses (e.g. 'sprites/player.png'). W2 fills a conventional default path; W3 confirms/overwrites it when it writes the file. Empty string until generated.

width.description: Pixel width — PER-FRAME dims (the Preloader's frameWidth), NEVER the sheet width: for type:'animation' the on-disk strip is frames.length × width wide. From gdd.assetList[].width if present, else an archetype default (a HINT W3 may refine and write back).

height.description: Pixel height — PER-FRAME (the Preloader's frameHeight; same sourcing as width).

frames.description: For type:'animation' — ordered frame names (from gdd.assetList[].frames, e.g. ['idle','run','jump']). Omit for non-animations.

entityIds.description: The gdd.entities[].id values that reference this slot via assetSlot (provenance; helps W3 prompt and W4 wire). Omit for non-entity slots (backgrounds, tiles, sfx).

description.description: The generation prompt carried from gdd.assetList[].description (what it depicts + view direction). W3's primary input. Omit only for entity-derived slots with no assetList row (W3 falls back to the entity description).

status.description: Lifecycle. W2 writes 'pending'. The template Preloader renders a colored-rect placeholder for any non-'generated' slot so the game boots with zero art. W3 sets 'generated' (or 'placeholder' in placeholder-only mode) after writing the file.
